personal.name: Sasidhar Chintapalli
personal.title: Senior Director, Product Architecture at Uniphore

hero.tagline: I build scalable SaaS platforms, architect data systems, and integrate Generative AI into real-world solutions.
hero.description: Senior Director, Product Architecture at Uniphore with 16+ years of experience in building enterprise-grade distributed systems and AI platforms.

about.bio: Seasoned Software Architect and Full-Stack Developer with over 16 years of experience in designing and building scalable, high-performance web applications and distributed systems. Passionate about creating elegant solutions that balance technical excellence with user experience and business value.
approach: User-centered design principles with a focus on intuitive interfaces
Clean, maintainable code following SOLID principles and design patterns
Test-Driven Development (TDD) to ensure code quality and reliability
Performance optimization and scalability considerations from day one
Scalable microservices architecture with containerization and orchestration

experience.title: Senior Director, Product Architecture
responsibilities: Architecting Uniphore's Business AI platform built on a 4-layer architecture: Data, Knowledge, Model, and Application layers
ModeHub: Platformizing the model layer with Models as a Service, enabling model development/fine-tuning, serving, inference, governance, and cost/performance observability
Data Agents: Implementing a Zero-Copy architecture for structured and unstructured data acquisition
Platform Redesign: Enhancing the existing platform for scale, performance, and stability

experience.title: Head of Product Architecture, Office of CTO
responsibilities: Spearheaded the development of Infoworks AI (ai.infoworks.io), a cutting-edge SaaS platform
Architected enterprise-grade Agentic AI platform enabling 'Ask Your Data' through natural language queries
Designed flexible plugin architecture for seamless enterprise integration

experience.title: Architect
responsibilities: Architected Kubernetes-based deployment for scalability and reliability
Containerized all services with service mesh architecture
Developed custom Spark compute for ETL jobs on Kubernetes

experience.title: Principal Software Engineer
responsibilities: Worked on A/B testing framework and marketing integrations

experience.title: Principal Software Engineer
responsibilities: Designed and developed e-commerce platform for real estate

experience.title: Principal/Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Worked on games like DrawSomething, CastleVille, Empires & Allies

experience.title: Senior System Engineer
responsibilities: Worked on web services and content management systems

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subheading: Have a question or want to work together? I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.

projects.name: AI Platform Architecture
projects.description: Designed and implemented a 4-layer Business AI platform with Data, Knowledge, Model, and Application layers. Built ModelHub for Models as a Service with comprehensive governance and observability.

projects.name: Agentic AI Platform
projects.description: Architected enterprise-grade Agentic AI platform enabling natural language queries on data. Implemented RAG architecture with flexible plugin system for enterprise integration.

projects.name: Kubernetes Deployment Platform
projects.description: Built scalable Kubernetes-based deployment architecture with containerized services and service mesh. Developed custom Spark compute for ETL jobs on Kubernetes.

projects.name: Data Agents Platform
projects.description: Implemented Zero-Copy architecture for structured and unstructured data acquisition. Designed scalable data ingestion pipelines handling millions of records daily.

projects.name: Distributed System Architecture
projects.description: Architected high-performance distributed systems using Apache Kafka, Spark, and Hadoop. Built systems serving millions of users with 99.9% uptime.

projects.name: SaaS Platform Development
projects.description: Developed enterprise SaaS platforms with robust authentication, multi-tenancy, and real-time analytics. Integrated AI capabilities for enhanced user experience.
